summary: Frontend testing for driver document status improvements in AllPendingJoinRequests.js - ALL TESTS PASSED. The component now correctly displays document status badges, warning banners, and disabled/enabled accept buttons based on document completeness.
critical_code_review_comments: AllPendingJoinRequests.js now includes getDriverDocumentsStatus() function (lines 15-35) that correctly calculates document status
Document status badges display correctly: green for complete, yellow for incomplete with count (e.g., 2/3)
Warning banner with amber background shows missing documents when expanded
Accept button is properly disabled (bg-gray-400 cursor-not-allowed) for incomplete documents
Accept button is enabled (bg-green-500) for complete documents
seed_data_creation: 6 test drivers: 4 with complete documents, 2 with incomplete documents (created by main agent)
context_for_next_testing_agent: AllPendingJoinRequests.js improvements are working correctly. Document status is displayed in the driver list and expanded details view.

features_tested.document_status_badges: ✅ Green 'وثائق مكتملة' for complete, Yellow 'وثائق ناقصة (2/3)' for incomplete
features_tested.warning_banner_incomplete: ✅ Yellow banner with '⚠️ الوثائق غير مكتملة' and missing docs list
features_tested.disabled_accept_button: ✅ Gray 'وثائق ناقصة' button for incomplete documents

api_verification.GET /api/admin/delivery/pending: ✅ Returns correct data with document fields
